svg.title: Agent runtime architecture across 20 layers
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture: entry points feed a runtime core containing tools, memory, hooks, and context, which dispatches to either a ReAct loop or a multi-agent pipeline. Observability and a dead-letter queue sit as cross-cutting concerns.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Click CLI dispatch commands in agent.py?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI layer isolate session memory?')
sendPrompt('How does the MCP server expose agent tools?')

g.text: Builds the agent, attaches callbacks, owns the loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through one iteration of the ReAct loop in core.py')
sendPrompt('How does the LangGraph pipeline route work and where does Strands differ?')
sendPrompt('What does Claude do inside the runtime?')
sendPrompt('What does Claude do inside the runtime?')
sendPrompt('How does the DLQ classify transient versus permanent failures?')
sendPrompt('What does the autonomous heartbeat loop do?')
